textByHash.39f006d0b329bd1c0331657fa80a2ddad292768b: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.
textByHash.3d20b979a97532d7ff15b2b65522026d77f1c9c0: This is our town! We live here. It's called Burgh de Rott, and you ain't coming in!
textByHash.4aa867e5cdee611b77c9f52fa5b952a4b92476e4: As if you don't know! It's that dark city to the east where humans are kept like animals to feed those greedy evil vampyres!
textByHash.572880e21af58ee1308ab3c708e6ffa587e5c6c9: We don't care. You probably want our food then, so you ain't coming in!
textByHash.5f3441d967f57d0bd2933da710eeffa5a07166c4: Hey! Don't try to sweet talk me. I know you want something! But we got nothing! Nothing!
textByHash.60d211d9d9581fe0c4be9fb576febdb3fc73077d: Yeah, okay then eh! No way! You can't trick me like that!
textByHash.68b2c829514019ab40c55d665c4616ec925883cd: Blimey, did you see that? She put some food in the chest for us! She's probably not after anything!
textByHash.7abf0ac6eb57644cffacc125ae7a5a6d0be7301e: We escaped from the vampyres. They had us trapped in Meiyerditch to drink our blood! Yuck!
textByHash.825cab76943763b2eafb4b0a7d8001aebf61ad7c: And as for food, why we've barely got enough to feed ourselves. So you ain't having none!
textByHash.83349c1c2f3bde590400c294ed67f070bc9304d3: Blimey, did you see that? He put some food in the chest for us! She's probably not after anything!
textByHash.8aa353c151e41a61f02c152e7a91ee5cff2097a2: Get out of it! You're not having our food or our blood!
textByHash.97ab1bf5af457dc2155d63e388f89894e9107388: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you. I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in
textByHash.9eb100951aef3762817f8f0c792ccc2275739636: Blimey, did you see that? She put some food in the chest for us! He's probably not after anything!
textByHash.a057f01d609258e9f144403d125af532c61362b8: Well, that's as maybe, but yous probably wants to drink ours blood! And you aint having it and you aint coming in!
textByHash.a2146a9c4997634f3c5d1e89c524159d2324c6f3: Well met! My name's Florin, I do a bit of this, a bit of that. Just try to survive really, there's nothing much else we can do.
textByHash.a81ef3d79d7f17bb6e980f4b986921331723d7c9: What blood we've got, we're keeping for ourselves! You can tell that stinking Vanstrom to go suck a cow's udder!
textByHash.ab5e827632f97485c4c4cdc3ed33b98aed95330a: Hey, what did you put in that chest? Is it something tasty, like a nice cooked snail? Or perhaps a well matured piece of cheese with some fresh bread? Ohhh, I bet it's dead tasty...
textByHash.c0a1f52b4d91c5e5df0eed8df55a9ffd1c8ac4e6: most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
textByHash.cd4b0057e2a7be2fae19a26a6f1d95979ba98308: Get out of it! You ain't comming in here to get our blood or our food!
textByHash.ce0af90cf2a7c8ba2e0f5e41d37179cf8c1a48c5: Blimey, did you see that? He put some food in the chest for us! He's probably not after anything!
textByHash.e32b51b43a35372bb5bfaa59db291c0e7d86a116: Your probably one of them stinking vampyres in disguise! You ain't coming in!
textByHash.e60b9b7a076ef98c181f3236654c3cafa131c312: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.
textByHash.e8c07de762b263b8aaaab35de3b645373e9449b8: Hey it's the Hero! Wow! You're amazing, how on earth did you manage to tackle those two juvinates and Gadderanks? And the town is lovely, you've done a great job!
textByHash.f6326423133f6b4722f0d62011272ec8c1e988ef: You probably want to eat it all and we ain't gonna let you!
